description: Composition:This t-shirt is cotton dry-FitWash Care:It can either be hand washed or machine washedFitting:Comfort FitAction:Summer's back and it's time to stay well dressed but cool. nike brings to you this blue t-shirt with unique heat absorption technology to keep you dry when on an afternoon outing. Pair this light blue slant-striped tee with a pair of light blue jeans and floaters for that casual look. Since this is a Sports tee, avoid combining it with cotton or corduroy bottoms.
